name: Apple Inc.
businessModelSummary: Apple designs and manufactures premium consumer electronics including iPhones, iPads, Macs, and wearables, complemented by a software and services ecosystem. The company generates revenue through direct hardware sales, software licensing, and high-margin digital services including the App Store, Apple Music, iCloud, and Apple TV+. Apple combines vertical integration of hardware and software with a global distribution network to maintain brand premium positioning and ecosystem lock-in.
regulators: China Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT)
